meta.taskName: Models Subject + TutorProfile + TutorSubject, Seed, Migration

prompt.goal: Create core EF entities for tutor profiles: Subject, TutorProfile, TutorSubject. Register DbSets + Fluent API, seed sample Subjects, add EF migration AddTutorProfileCore. After this task, DB has Subjects / TutorProfiles / TutorSubjects tables ready for later UI tasks.
prompt.currentState: - M1 Auth is complete (Identity, OtpCodes, TutorCertificate with temporary UserId FK). - TutorCertificate MUST NOT be changed in this task (FK migrate is M2-T2). - No Subject / TutorProfile / TutorSubject models yet. - SeedRolesAsync already runs at startup in Program.cs. - Schema reference: Database/StudyMate_Schema.sql MODULE 2 section.
prompt.taskUnit: 1. Create Models/Subject.cs 2. Create Models/TutorProfile.cs 3. Create Models/TutorSubject.cs (composite key) 4. Update ApplicationDbContext DbSets + Fluent API 5. Seed Subjects at startup (idempotent) 6. Add EF migration AddTutorProfileCore 7. dotnet build
prompt.scope: - Models only + DbContext + seed Subjects + migration - Field map TutorProfile per BreakTask M2-T1 and StudyMate_Schema.sql - TutorSubject: composite PK (TutorProfileId, SubjectId) - Unique index on TutorProfiles.UserId - Indexes: IsAvailable + IsVerified (optional, matches schema) - Seed ≥ 8 subjects (Toán, Vật lý, Hóa, Tiếng Anh, IELTS, TOEIC, C#, Python, …)
prompt.hardRules: - NO Controller, View, ViewModel - NO change TutorCertificate model or AccountController - NO TutorAvailability / DemoLesson (M2-T2) - NO FileStorage - DO NOT drop or rewrite existing Identity / OtpCodes config - DO NOT hardcode secrets - Keep namespaces StudyMate.Models / StudyMate.Data
prompt.tasks: 1. Read all context files; summarize current DbContext and schema 2. Implement Subject, TutorProfile, TutorSubject models 3. Wire ApplicationDbContext 4. Add idempotent SeedSubjectsAsync in Program.cs (or Data/SeedData.cs) 5. dotnet ef migrations add AddTutorProfileCore 6. dotnet build — must pass 7. Report changes and risks
prompt.constraints: - .NET 10 / ASP.NET Core MVC / EF Core SQL Server - Navigation properties optional but preferred for TutorProfile ↔ User / Subjects - Decimal HourlyRate: precision 10,2; AverageRating 3,2 - XML doc comments on public types/properties where useful
prompt.acceptanceCriteria: - [ ] Migration generates Subjects, TutorProfiles, TutorSubjects - [ ] UserId unique on TutorProfiles - [ ] Seed ≥ 8 subjects when empty - [ ] dotnet build 0 errors - [ ] AccountController untouched
prompt.testPlan: 1. dotnet build → pass 2. Migration files exist under StudyMate/Migrations/ 3. (Optional) database update and SELECT Subjects
prompt.outputRequired: - StudyMate/Models/Subject.cs - StudyMate/Models/TutorProfile.cs - StudyMate/Models/TutorSubject.cs - StudyMate/Data/ApplicationDbContext.cs (updated) - StudyMate/Program.cs or Data/SeedData.cs (seed subjects) - StudyMate/Migrations/*AddTutorProfileCore* - Docs/Prompts/M2_T1_TutorProfileCoreModels.xml - Docs/Reports/Report_M2_T1_YYYY-MM-DD.md
